angle: Short-let caps and changing rules add another thing to track. Hububb keeps the operation organised so the host stays on top of it without the spreadsheet.
brief: Type-only, dark. The read: the rules are one more thing to carry, and the operating layer should carry it. Note: deliberately does NOT promise mid-term or longer stays (that is Hububb Stay, out of scope). Frames Host as the system that keeps you organised against caps, not as a booking workaround.

copy.headline: The rules change. Your operation should not scramble
copy.subhead: keep bookings, access and turnovers organised in one place, caps and all.
